title: Race-condition-aware unique email flow
prompt: Build the full flow for ensuring user emails are unique, race-condition-aware: (1) unsafe_validate_unique(:email, Repo) in the changeset (pre-insert friendly error), (2) unique_constraint(:email) in the changeset to catch DB-level race, (3) unique_index(:users, [:email]) in migration, (4) a `create_user/1` function in MyApp.Accounts that calls Repo.insert and pattern-matches the constraint-violation return. Write schema to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex, migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260413200000_create_users.exs, and context module to lib/my_app/accounts.ex.
tier_rationale: Synthesis of three capabilities + race-handling context function. Hard because the entire flow must be coherent.
